meta.project: Asyut & New Valley Water Utility Website

product_overview: Public-facing React single-page site that provides informational content, news, projects/tenders archives, and a site-wide keyword search for the Asyut & New Valley water utility.
core_goals: Provide easy route-based access to company information and public resources.
Allow users to discover and read news, projects, and tenders details.
Enable keyword-based discovery of site content via a dedicated search page.
Keep all primary content publicly accessible without authentication.

features.name: Content Navigation
features.description: Users navigate the site's main informational sections (home, about, branches, media, archives) via route-based navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open navigation menu -> Select a section link -> Navigate to target route (for example /about-company or /branches or /news-archive) -> See target content page
Navigate to / -> Open navigation menu -> Select the news archive link -> Navigate to /news-archive -> See list of news summaries
Navigate to / -> Open navigation menu -> Select a section link -> Navigate to target route -> Fail to load target content page -> See an error or fallback message

features.name: News Browsing
features.description: Users browse archived news items and read full news details.
user_flows: Navigate to /news-archive -> Open news archive page -> Select a news card -> Navigate to /news/:id -> Read news details content
Navigate to /news-archive -> Open news archive page -> Use browser/controls to focus a news card -> Navigate to /news/:id -> Read news details content
Navigate to /news-archive -> Open news archive page -> Select a news card -> Navigate to /news/:id -> Fail to load news details -> See an error or 'not available' message

features.name: Projects and Tenders Catalog
features.description: Users browse project and tender archives and open individual project or tender details.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects-archive -> Open archive list page -> Select a project card -> Navigate to /projects/:id -> View item details page
Navigate to /tenders-archive -> Open archive list page -> Select a tender card -> Navigate to /tenders/:id -> View item details page
Navigate to /projects-archive -> Open archive list page -> Select a project card -> Navigate to /projects/:id -> Fail to load project details -> See an error or 'not available' message

features.name: Keyword Search
features.description: Users perform keyword searches to find matching site content from a dedicated search page.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Open search page -> Type search keywords -> Submit search -> Review matching results
Navigate to /search -> Open search page -> Type search keywords that match no content -> Submit search -> See 'no results' feedback
Navigate to /search -> Open search page -> Leave query empty -> Attempt to submit search -> See guidance to enter search terms

features.name: Content Navigation
features.description: Users browse company informational pages through route-based navigation.

features.name: News Browsing
features.description: Users browse archived news and open details pages.

features.name: Projects and Tenders Catalog
features.description: Users browse project/tender cards and open details pages.

features.name: Keyword Search
features.description: Users search site content from a dedicated search page.

known_limitations.issue: No explicit authenticated routes are defined.
known_limitations.impact: All pages are publicly accessible and auth flows are not testable.
